title: MessageCooldownPRO
description: Adds a cooldown to messages based on rank
body:
MessageCooldownPRO
The Ultimate Message Cooldown Solution for Your Minecraft Server

MessageCooldownPRO is a powerful, lightweight plugin designed to prevent chat spam on your Minecraft server. With its intuitive permission-based cooldown system, you can effectively manage how frequently players can send messages, creating a cleaner, more enjoyable chat experience for everyone.
Key Features

⏱️ Tiered Cooldown System

Default tier: 5-second cooldown for regular players

Premium tier: 3-second cooldown for donators or trusted players

VIP tier: 1-second cooldown for your most valued players

Bypass permission: No cooldown for staff members

🛠️ Advanced Configuration

Fully customizable cooldown times for each permission tier

Personalize cooldown messages with color codes

Custom formatting with eye-catching divider lines

Simple, clean notification design

💼 Administrative Tools

Reset cooldowns for individual players

Clear all active cooldowns at once

Hot-reload configuration without server restart

Comprehensive permission system

⚡ Performance Optimized

Minimal CPU usage

No database required

Efficient player tracking system

Compatible with all major Minecraft versions (1.20+)

Why Choose MessageCooldownPRO?

🔹 Simple Yet Powerful

While other anti-spam plugins come with complicated setups and features you'll never use, our plugin focuses on doing one thing exceptionally well. It stops chat spam without the bloat.

🔹 Player-Friendly Design

The clear, customizable cooldown notifications ensure players always know exactly how long they need to wait, reducing frustration and confusion.

🔹 Reward Your Supporters

With the tiered permission system, you can offer faster message rates as a perk for donors or long-time members, creating an additional incentive for supporting your server.

🔹 Perfect for All Server Types

Whether you're running a survival, creative, minigame, or roleplay server, MessageCooldownPRO adapts perfectly to your needs. It's especially valuable on high-population servers where chat can quickly become overwhelming.
Commands

/msgcooldown reload - Reload the plugin configuration
/msgcooldown reset <player> - Reset cooldown for a specific player
/msgcooldown reset all - Reset cooldowns for all players

Permissions

msgcooldown.default - Access to default cooldown (5 seconds)
msgcooldown.premium - Access to premium cooldown (3 seconds)
msgcooldown.vip - Access to VIP cooldown (1 second)
msgcooldown.bypass - Bypass cooldown completely
msgcooldown.admin - Access to administrative commands

Installation

Download MessageCooldownPRO.jar

Place it in your server's plugins folder

Restart your server or use a plugin loader

Configure settings in the config.yml file (optional)

Assign permissions to your players ( for example for vip just put whatever type of cooldown u want )

Support and Feedback

We're dedicated to making MessageCooldownPRO the best chat cooldown plugin available. If you have suggestions, encounter any issues, or just want to share your experience, please reach out through our support channels.

MessageCooldownPRO - ~~Chat Management Made Simple~~
